title: Vortex Phase Space: Code for Structural Framework for Binding and Informational Richness in Complex Networks
description: Code to reproduce all experiments in: Recinos E. 'Vortex Phase Space: A Structural Framework for Binding and Informational Richness in Complex Networks.' Submitted to Chaos: An Interdisciplinary Journal of Nonlinear Science, 2026. Includes computation of Omega_bind and Omega_rich metrics, synthetic network benchmarks (Table 1), the fixed-density SBM sweep (primary evidence, Section 8 Part 3), reservoir computing task dissociation (NARMA-10, multi-pattern, sine tracking), and C. elegans null model analysis.
